profile_route.source: Post-pass181 pinned RCH fmd linalg profile recorded in frankenjax-6ykcu and Agent Mail

top_rows.decision: dominant profile row after pass181; recursive/communication-avoiding route rejected in frankenjax-6ykcu because current GEMM/Dot contract is bit-exact ascending-k

profile_route.alien_primitive: cache-blocked panel locality: pc-major blocked B-pack layout for the exact-order safe-Rust GEMM macro-kernel

lever.description: For the k-blocked GEMM path only, pack B as [pc-block][column-panel][kc][NR] instead of the flat path's [column-panel][k][NR]. The flat packed path still uses the original panel-major pack.

same_worker_gate.baseline_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline 'linalg/matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64' -- --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --sample-size 10 --noplot
same_worker_gate.candidate_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline 'linalg/matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64' -- --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --sample-size 10 --noplot
same_worker_gate.intervals: non-overlapping: candidate high 176.59 ms < baseline low 177.27 ms

score.rationale: Small percentage win, but on the dominant profile row with same-worker non-overlapping Criterion intervals and a structural cache-layout lever.

isomorphism: The blocked GEMM loop order remains pc -> row-superpanel -> column-superpanel -> tile -> jp -> l, and each output element still accumulates products in strictly ascending k/l order.
The new pack changes only the address used to read B values: bpack[pc*npanels*NR + jp*kc*NR + l*NR + jj] equals b[(pc+l)*n + jp*NR + jj].
The flat packed path remains on the original panel-major pack_b_panels layout, so smaller nonblocked GEMM behavior and performance surface are unchanged.
C first-block zero seeding and subsequent running-C loads are unchanged; no reassociation, FMA request, mixed precision, tolerance relaxation, or parallel reduction is introduced.
Thread row ownership, row-major output order, dtype, shape, error behavior, NaN and signed-zero surface, and RNG absence are unchanged.

proof_commands.result: passed: 11 passed, 0 failed, 1 ignored; includes blocked/packed/threaded bit-identity, special-value bit-identity, matmul_2d_into parity, and packed NR8 golden digest
passed: 2 passed; covers pc-major source mapping and serial-vs-parallel packed-B bit equality

validation.result: exit 0; no criticals and no unsafe blocks; UBS fmt/clippy/check/test-build sections clean; pre-existing broad warning inventory remains

decision.reason: Same-worker fmd GEMM2048 median improved from 178.28 ms to 174.25 ms with non-overlapping Criterion intervals; Score 3.0.
decision.next_primitive: Reprofile after landing. If GEMM remains top, attack the next structurally different exact-order panel/cache primitive or file a deeper contract bead for any FP-reordered algorithm before implementation.
